title: Mining Helmet
description: Add lights source that you could wear.
body:
# 📖 About
This mod adds items which emits light that could help in cave exploration. 

##  ‍🍳 Recipe
### Mining Helmet Recipe

![Recipe for Mining Helmet](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/SsTvttLF/images/f28ce310a9cab5bc54d3a44c120a2dcdc3863fb7.webp)

### Mining Soul in a Bottle

![Recipe for Soul in a Bottle](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com//data/SsTvttLF/images/f2a78afa841ec0983ced68f907fcb9d07759b17e.webp)

## 🖼️ Images
<details>
<summary>More</summary>

![Player with Mining Helmet](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/SsTvttLF/images/05c6211f904e4a133752011590c41166f5a761dc.webp)

</details>

## 🚧 How it works?
It's only adding some items and custom model; rest of the whole light mechanic takes on another mod (Lamb Dynamic Lights); without which this mod wouldn't work.

# 📝 Requires
* [Lamb Dynamic Lights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)
* [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets) (Optional)
